b:T245f,<div class="specification">
<p>A biased four-sided die is rolled. The following table gives the probability of each score.</p>
<p style="text-align: center;"><img src="data:image/png;base64,"/></p>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Find the value of<em> k</em>.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>Calculate the expected value of the score.</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px; padding-right: 20px;">
<p>The die is rolled 80 times. On how many rolls would you expect to obtain a three?</p>
<div class="marks">[2]</div>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>c:T4c0,<div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p style="color: #999;font-size: 90%;font-style: italic;">* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.</p><p>evidence of summing to 1      <em><strong>(M1)</strong></em></p>
<p><em>eg   </em>0.28 + <em>k</em> + 1.5 + 0.3 = 1,  0.73 + <em>k</em> = 1</p>
<p><em>k</em> = 0.27     <em><strong>A1 N2</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">a.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>correct substitution into formula for E (<em>X</em>)      <em><strong>(A1)</strong></em><br/>eg  1 × 0.28 + 2 × <em>k</em> + 3 × 0.15 + 4 × 0.3</p>
<p>E (<em>X</em>) = 2.47  (exact)      <em><strong>A1 N2</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">b.</div>
</div><div class="question" style="padding-left: 20px;">
<p>valid approach      <em><strong>(M1)</strong></em></p>
<p><em>eg  np</em>, 80 × 0.15</p>
<p>12     <em><strong>A1 N2</strong></em></p>
<p><em><strong>[2 marks]</strong></em></p>
<div class="question_part_label">c.</div>
</div>2:["$","article",null,{"className":"q-page","children":[["$","p",null,{"style":{"margin":0},"children":["$","$L6",null,{"href":"/subject/maths/topic/4/","children":["← back to ","Mathematics"," topic ","4"]}]}],["$","h1",null,{"children":"18M.2.SL.TZ1.S_2"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-meta","children":[["$","span",null,{"className":"tag","children":"pestle"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"Mathematics"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"AI"}],["$","span",null,{"children":"SL"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["Paper ","2"]}],["$","span",null,{"children":"18M"}],["$","span",null,{"children":["· ","sl-4-7-discrete-random-variables"]}],["$","a",null,{"href":"https://pestle.pages.dev/app/","target":"_blank","rel":"noopener","children":"source ↗"}]]}],["$","div",null,{"className":"q-content","dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$b"}}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Markscheme / solution"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"$c"}}]]}],["$","details",null,{"className":"solution","children":[["$","summary",null,{"children":"Examiners’ report"}],["$","div",null,{"dangerouslySetInnerHTML":{"__html":"<div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">a.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">b.</div>\n</div><div class=\"question\" style=\"padding-left: 20px;\">\n[N/A]\n<div class=\"question_part_label\">c.</div>\n</div>"}}]]}]]}]
